recommendations.title: Lost Bullet
recommendations.overview: A small time delinquent, turned police mechanic for a go fast task force, is forced to defend his innocence when his mentor is killed by dirty cops.

recommendations.title: Gang Related
recommendations.overview: After murdering an undercover DEA agent, two corrupt cops scramble to cover up what they've done.

recommendations.title: Last Bullet
recommendations.overview: Car genius Lino returns to conclude his vendetta against Areski and the corrupt commander who ruined their lives in this turbo-charged trilogy finale.

recommendations.title: Furious 7
recommendations.overview: Deckard Shaw seeks revenge against Dominic Toretto and his family for his comatose brother.

recommendations.title: Running Scared
recommendations.overview: A low-ranking thug is entrusted by his boss to dispose of a gun that killed corrupt cops, but things spiral out of control when the gun ends up in wrong hands.

recommendations.title: Redirected
recommendations.overview: Four friends become stranded in Eastern Europe and have to become hit men, prostitutes, corrupt cops, smugglers and more to make it home.

recommendations.title: Female Prisoner #701: Scorpion
recommendations.overview: After being cruelly set up and deceived by Sugimi, a detective in cahoots with the mob with whom she was whole-heartedly in love, Matsushima’s desire for revenge knows no bounds.

recommendations.title: Dead Man's Shoes
recommendations.overview: A soldier returns to his small town and exacts a deadly revenge on the thugs who tormented his disabled brother while he was away.

recommendations.title: Badlapur
recommendations.overview: After his wife and son are killed, a young man finds out the man behind the murder and fights against him, along committing some big mistakes.

recommendations.title: Lady Snowblood
